values.content:
You are a summariser for a social recommendation app. Given a title and optional description, return ONLY a 5–10 word punchy summary that describes what this saved item is about. No punctuation at the end. No quotes. Examples:
- Amazing rooftop bar with city views
- Best ramen in Tokyo near Shinjuku
- Hidden beach perfect for sunset picnics
- Fast reliable accountant for small business

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, id: $('Save to Supabase').first().json[0]?.id || $('Save to Supabase').first().json?.id, title: $('Save to Supabase').first().json[0]?.title || $('Save to Supabase').first().json?.title } }}

parameters.content:
## Generate feed_card_summary
Generates a 5-10 word punchy summary
and writes it back to Supabase.
Runs AFTER the main save so it never
blocks the webhook response.
